title: StorageBlock - BlockBlock addon
description: A BlockBlock addon mod that adds support for various inventory related mods, such as Tom's Simple Storage and Sophisticated Backpacks
body:
Storage Block is an addon mod created for [BlockBlock](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockblock) to add compatibility for storage related mods, which BlockBlock sometimes does not work with. This mod aims to fix that.

**Currently fixes the following mods:**
- [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks-(unoffical-fabric-port))
- [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage)

---
